_doc: Canonical required-status-checks list per DEC-2525. Drift detector (#2500, platform/scripts/required-checks-drift.sh) verifies this list against quality.yml jobs + GitHub branch-protection + Repository Rulesets. Changes go through PR review per DEC-2525 enforcement clause.
